content.thinking:
No web search available. I'll use my knowledge for tax deadlines - these are well-established dates that don't change frequently.

For US:
- Tax year follows calendar year (Jan 1 - Dec 31)
- Individual filing deadline: April 15 (or next business day if it falls on weekend/holiday)
- For 2025 filing (2024 tax year): April 15, 2025
- Extension available until October 15

For Canada:
- Tax year follows calendar year (Jan 1 - Dec 31)
- Individual filing deadline: April 30
- For 2025 filing (2024 tax year): April 30, 2025
- Self-employed: June 15 (but any amount owing is still due April 30)

For India:
- Fiscal year: April 1 - March 31
- Assessment Year (AY) follows - so FY 2024-25 = AY 2025-26
- Individual filing deadline: July 31
- For FY 2024-25 (AY 2025-26): July 31, 2025

Let me create the project structure for tracking these. I'll create separate project files for US and Canada as priority, and include the India info for reference.
